title: A pilot reported a disc shaped UFO hovering at 50.000ft over Lages-SC [1996]
excerpt: AUG 14th, 1996. Time: 20h45. During: 15 minutes. The pilot and two other people observed, with the naked eye, from the cabin of the aircraft of Flight VARIG 64391-5, an unidentified flying object that was static at an altitude of FL500 [50,000ft] near the city of Lages, State of Santa Catarina. According to the pilot’s […]
text_preview: AUG 14th, 1996. Time: 20h45. During: 15 minutes. The pilot and two other people observed, with the naked eye, from the cabin of the aircraft of Flight VARIG 64391-5, an unidentified flying object that was static at an altitude of FL500 [50,000ft] near the city of Lages, State of Santa Catarina. According to the pilot’s report, the UFO was yellow and looked like a “gaseous mass in the shape of a disc with an obscured center”. The object remained stationary for the entire sighting. The COMDABRA’s report [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] also stated that: “The information was passed on by TF1
summary: A VARIG pilot and two others observed a stationary yellow gaseous disc-shaped UFO hovering at 50,000ft near Lages-SC for 15 minutes on Aug 14, 1996.
